link.alt: Pathfinder #206: Bring the House Down pg. 83

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Artifact
traits.text: Items with this trait are artifacts. These magic items can't be crafted by normal means, and they can't be damaged by normal means. Artifacts are always rare or unique.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: You make a Strike with  *Retribution* against a target within 120 feet that you can see and who damaged you within the last minute, as if they were within reach. Once  *Retribution* is restored, it becomes a  *+3 major striking keen shifting wounding war razor* and gains the following additional activations.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: Choose a target within 120 feet who you can see. That target must attempt a DC 44 Fortitude save.
abilities.success: The target takes 3d6 persistent bleed damage .
abilities.failure: As success, but one of their eyes is damaged, rendering them dazzled . The target also becomes drained 1. The dazzled and drained condition are permanent until removed by  *cleanse affliction* or a similar effect.
abilities.critical_failure: As failure, but 6d6 persistent bleed damage and the target is blinded instead of dazzled, and drained 2 instead of drained 1. If the target is ever reduced to 0 Hit Points or less while under this curse, they immediately die.

traits.name: Curse
traits.text: A curse is an effect that places some long-term affliction on a creature. Curses are always magical and are typically the result of a spell or trap. Effects with this trait can be removed only by effects that specifically target curses.

traits.name: Death
traits.text: An effect with the death trait kills you immediately if it reduces you to 0 HP. Some death effects can bring you closer to death or slay you outright without reducing you to 0 HP.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.trigger: You are about to attempt a saving throw against a curse
abilities.effect: If you succeed or critically succeed against the curse, it is reflected back to its source and it does not affect you; the source must then attempt a saving throw against the curse.
